body.title: 投资要点：
body.data:
2022.5.05-2022.5.06：电新行业区间跌幅为-2.36%，同期沪深300跌幅为-2.67%，跑赢沪深300指数0.31pct。在申万31个行业板块中位列第22位。

 建更加安全可控的产业链供应链体系、近地化构建“3+5+2”汽车产业园区新格局、提升汽车产业链自主创新与核心竞争力、推动智能网联与新能源汽车场景应用、强化要素资源供给和服务保障五方面的具体措施。据GGII数据，Q1中国动力电池出货量同比增长近3倍，出货量超96GWh，其中磷酸铁锂电池占比55%，三元动力电池占比45%。政策不断支持新能源汽车产业，行业高景气度延续，赛道投资价值较

 出：推进生产生活低碳化。推动能源清洁低碳安全高效利用，引导非化石能源消费和分布式能源发展，在有条件的地区推进屋顶分布式光伏发电。我们认为光伏产业将在国家新基建中发挥重要作用，看好2022年光伏装机量持续提升，建议关注光伏产业链相关标的。风电方面，5月5日，广西河池发改委公布了关于河池市2022年风力和光伏发电项目竞争性配置评分结果的公示。根据公示，本批次共收到申报项目77项，建设容量11205MW，其中风力发电项目32项，建设容

 科技，综合续航700km以上，馈电氢耗低至0.65kg/100km。过去一段时间以来，广汽、上汽、海马、东风、一汽等车企均在燃料电池乘用车上传来新进展，长城也明确提出要推出全球首款C级氢能SUV。我们认为中国新能源乘用车市场规模较大，燃料电池产业链未来发展前景广阔，投资主题将以绿氢为主。建议关注涉及氢能产业链的相关标

 风险因素：新能源车销量不及预期；新能源汽车安全风险；受疫情影响光伏市场解封不及预期；原材料价格波动风险；海上风电审批和开工不及预期；风电已核准项目完工并网不及预期；光伏装机增长不及

body.title: 行业相对沪深300指数表现
body.metadata: Electrical Equipment, Husheng 300, stock index, trend comparison, 2022-2024
body.data: The chart is a line graph comparing the performance trends of "电气设备" (Electrical Equipment) and "沪港300" (Shanghai-Hong Kong 300 Index) from 2022 to 2024. The vertical axis represents percentage change (from -10% to +70%), and the horizontal axis represents time, marked in monthly intervals from 2022-05 to 2024-04. The red line represents the "电气设备" index, which shows a significant upward trend from 2022-05 to 2023-06, peaking near 70% in late 2023, followed by a sharp decline to below -10% by 2024-04. The black line represents the "沪港300" index, which remains relatively flat and stable throughout the period, hovering between -10% and 10%, indicating minimal volatility compared to the "电气设备" index. The chart highlights a stark contrast in volatility and growth patterns between the two indices, with "电气设备" exhibiting high volatility and "沪港300" showing more stability.

body.title: 1.1电气设备行业
body.data:
上周市场整体下跌，电力设备行业跌幅-2.36%，同期沪深300指数跌幅-2.67%，电力设备行业相对沪深300指数跑赢0.31pct。从板块排名来看，电气设备行业上周涨幅在申万31个一级行业板块中位列第22位，总体表现一般。

 资料来源：iFind，万联证券研究所

body.title: Comparison of Weekly Temperature and Year-Over-Year Growth Rate
body.metadata: Temperature trend, year-over-year growth rate, industry sectors, bar chart, line chart
body.data: The chart compares two metrics across various industry sectors: "上周温差" (weekly temperature difference), represented by gray bars, and "年初至当前" (year-to-date growth rate), represented by a red line. The vertical axis on the left measures the weekly temperature difference in percentage points, ranging from -6.00% to 3.00%, while the vertical axis on the right measures the year-over-year growth rate in percentage, ranging from -50.00% to 20.00%. The horizontal axis lists industry sectors such as 固定资产投资 (Fixed Asset Investment), 服务业 (Service Industry), 制造业 (Manufacturing), and 房地产 (Real Estate). The gray bars indicate the weekly temperature difference for each sector, with most sectors showing positive values, while the red line shows the year-over-year growth rate, which fluctuates significantly, reaching a peak above 20.00% for some sectors and dipping below -30.00% for others. The chart visually contrasts the stability of temperature differences with the volatility of growth rates across sectors.

body.title: 1.2电气设备子行业
body.data:
池/电网设备/光伏设备/电机/其他电源设备/风电设备涨跌幅分别为-4.23%/1.19%/-1.00%/-0.18%/0.22%/-1.31%。三级行业中锂电池/电池化学品/线缆部件及其他/电网自动化设备/锂电专用设备/光伏电池组件/光伏辅材/其它电源设备/输变电设备/光伏加工设备/配电设备/蓄电池及其他电池/火电设备/风电零部件/电工仪器

 从个股来看，上周申万电气设备行业挂牌的195只个股中上涨82只，平收8只，下跌105只，跑赢大盘的有165只股票。表现最好的是神力股份，涨幅为13.61%；表现最差的是宁德时代，跌幅为-8.15%。


 资料来源：iFind，万联证券研究所

body.title: Weekly and Year-to-Date Stock Price Deviation Chart
body.metadata: Stock price deviation, weekly change, year-to-date change, industry categories
body.data: The chart displays the weekly fluctuation and year-to-date performance deviation of various electrical equipment industry sectors. The horizontal axis lists different sectors including battery, electrical equipment, photovoltaic equipment, electric vehicles, other electrical equipment, power electronics, power grid equipment, etc. The vertical axis on the left represents the weekly fluctuation deviation in percentage, while the vertical axis on the right represents the year-to-date deviation in percentage. The gray bars indicate the weekly fluctuation deviation, and the red line with dots represents the year-to-date deviation. The chart shows that sectors such as wind power equipment and electrical instruments have significant negative deviations, while sectors like photovoltaic equipment and other electrical equipment show positive deviations. The overall trend indicates varying degrees of performance deviation across different sectors.

body.title: Stock Performance Comparison Table
body.metadata: Stock performance, weekly price change, company names
body.data: The table compares the stock performance of six companies, divided into two groups: "表现居前" (Top Performers) and "表现居后" (Bottom Performers). In the "表现居前" group, 神力股份 (Shenli Co., Ltd.) shows the highest weekly涨幅 (percentage increase) at 13.61%, followed by 金龙羽 (Jinlongyu), 捷昌驱动 (Jiechang Drive), 新宏泰 (Xin Hongtai), and ST 源森 (ST Yuansen) with weekly涨幅 of 11.63%, 11.50%, 11.19%, and 10.37% respectively. In the "表现居后" group, 宁德时代 (CATL) shows the largest weekly跌幅 (percentage decrease) at -8.15%, followed by 奥特迅 (Aotexun), 浙富控股 (Zhefu Holding), 智光电气 (Zhigu Electric), and 天能重工 (Tianeng Heavy Industry) with weekly跌幅 of -8.11%, -7.37%, -6.50%, and -6.38% respectively. This table presents a clear contrast between stocks that performed well and those that underperformed in the past week.

 年5月6日召开了第五届董事会第二十九次会议、第五届监事会第二十二次会议，审议通过了《关于投资建设年产30万吨锂电池电解液改扩建和10万吨铁锂电池拆解回收项目的议案》，公司拟通过孙公司福鼎市凯欣电池材料有限公司使用自筹资金投资建设“年产30万吨锂电池电解液改扩建和10万吨铁锂电池拆解回收项目”，项目总投资133,182万元，其中建设投资为50,585万元，铺底流动资金为82,597万元。公司可

 建“3+5+2”汽车产业园区新格局、提升汽车产业链自主创新与核心竞争力、推动智能网联与新能源汽车场景应用、强化要素资源供给和服务保障五方面的具体措施。据GGII数据，Q1中国动力电池出货量同比增长近3倍，出货量超96GWh，其中磷酸铁锂电池占比55%，三元动力电池占比45%。政策不断支持新能源汽车产业，行业高景气度延

body.title: Price Trend of Phosphate Iron Lithium, Cobalt Lithium, and Three Materials (811) in China
body.metadata: Price trend, phosphate iron lithium, cobalt lithium, three materials (811), China, time series
body.data: The line chart displays the price trends of three types of lithium-ion battery materials in China from May 2021 to May 2023. The vertical axis represents the price in RMB per ton, while the horizontal axis represents the time period. The red line, representing the national average price of phosphate iron lithium, shows a steady increase from approximately 20 RMB to around 45 RMB. The gray line, indicating the national average price of cobalt lithium, starts at about 40 RMB and rises to around 65 RMB. The dark red line, representing the national average price of three materials (811), remains relatively stable at approximately 10 RMB throughout the period. Overall, the chart indicates that phosphate iron lithium and cobalt lithium prices have increased significantly over the period, while the three materials (811) price has remained relatively low and stable.

body.title: Trend of Artificial Stone Demand by Income Level
body.metadata: Artificial stone demand, income level, time trend, 2021-2023
body.data: The line chart illustrates the trend of artificial stone demand categorized by income level from August 2021 to August 2023. The horizontal axis represents the timeline in months, while the vertical axis indicates the demand level. Three distinct lines represent different income groups: high-income (solid red), middle-income (gray dashed), and low-income (solid red). The high-income group shows a steady increase in demand, starting at 6 in August 2021 and reaching 7 by August 2023. The middle-income group starts at 5 in August 2021, fluctuates slightly, and stabilizes around 5.5 by August 2023. The low-income group begins at 2 in August 2021, shows gradual growth, and reaches 4 by August 2023. Overall, demand across all income levels is increasing over time, with high-income demand consistently leading.

body.title: Price Trend of Lithium Hexafluorophosphate and Lithium Iron Phosphate Electrolyte
body.metadata: Price trend, lithium hexafluorophosphate, lithium iron phosphate electrolyte, time series, 2021-2023
body.data: The chart displays the price trends of two lithium-related chemical products from May 2021 to May 2023. The red line represents the price of lithium hexafluorophosphate, which shows a steady increase from approximately 25 to over 60, peaking around mid-2022 before declining slightly. The gray line represents the price of lithium iron phosphate electrolyte, which remains relatively stable at a lower level, fluctuating between 10 and 15 throughout the period. The vertical axis indicates price in unspecified units, while the horizontal axis represents time in monthly intervals. The chart highlights the significant price volatility of lithium hexafluorophosphate compared to the more stable price of lithium iron phosphate electrolyte.

body.title: Comparison of Two Metrics for Hunan 16um Over Time
body.metadata: Hunan 16um, dry units, wet method, time series, trend comparison
body.data: The line chart displays two metrics for Hunan 16um over a time period from May 2021 to May 2022, with the horizontal axis representing dates (in 2-month intervals) and the vertical axis representing values. The red line represents "湖南16um/干法单位" (Hunan 16um/dry unit), which remains relatively stable at approximately 0.95. The gray line represents "湖南16um/湿法" (Hunan 16um/wet method), which stays consistently at around 1.2. Both lines show no significant fluctuation or trend over the observed period, indicating stability in both metrics.

body.title: 图表9：四氧化三钻、硫酸钻价格走势（万元/吨）
body.metadata: Lithium carbonate price, potassium permanganate price, price trend, time series, market dynamics
body.data: The chart displays the price trends of three lithium carbonate and potassium permanganate products from August 2021 to August 2023, with the vertical axis representing price in ten thousand yuan per ton and the horizontal axis representing time. The red line represents the price of Qinghai industrial-grade high-purity 99% lithium carbonate (salt lake type), the dark red line represents the price of Sichuan battery-grade 99.5% lithium carbonate (mine type), and the black line represents the price of 56.5% potassium permanganate. All three product prices show a significant upward trend over time, with the lithium carbonate prices increasing from around 10 to over 50 ten thousand yuan per ton, and the potassium permanganate price rising from around 10 to over 30 ten thousand yuan per ton. The lithium carbonate prices are consistently higher than the potassium permanganate price, and the price difference between the two types of lithium carbonate (salt lake type and mine type) is relatively small, with the mine type slightly higher than the salt lake type. The overall trend indicates a strong market demand and rising prices for these materials in recent years.

body.title: Price Trend of Gadolinium Compounds Over Time
body.metadata: Gadolinium compounds, price trend, time series, market analysis
body.data: The line chart illustrates the price trends of three gadolinium compounds from May 2021 to May 2022. The horizontal axis represents time, marked at intervals of approximately three months, while the vertical axis indicates price in unspecified units. There are three distinct lines: the red line represents the price of "四氧化三钴" (Gadolinium oxide), the gray line represents "硫酸钴" (Cobalt sulfate), and the dark red line represents the average price of "钴99.3%" (Cobalt 99.3%) and "钴99.8%" (Cobalt 99.8%). The red line for "四氧化三钴" shows a steady increase from around 27 to nearly 43. The gray line for "硫酸钴" remains relatively flat, hovering between 10 and 12. The dark red line for the average price of the two cobalt grades shows a moderate upward trend, starting near 20 and rising to approximately 38. All three lines demonstrate a general upward trend over the period, with the red line showing the most significant growth.

body.title: Solar Cell and Module Price Index Table
body.metadata: Solar cell prices, module prices, price fluctuations, high/low/average values, currency conversion
body.data: The table presents a detailed price index for various types of solar cells and modules, including multi-crystalline silicon wafers, monocrystalline silicon wafers, and PERC cells, across different thicknesses and specifications. It is divided into two main sections: “硅片 PC” (Silicon Wafer PC) and “电池片” (Cell Sheet). For each category, the table provides price data in RMB and USD for high points (255), low points (247), and average prices (249), along with the corresponding price fluctuation percentage. The “硅片 PC” section includes multi-crystalline and monocrystalline wafers in various thicknesses (1.65mm, 1.82mm, 2.10mm) with corresponding price ranges and fluctuations. The “电池片” section covers multi-crystalline and PERC cells, with specifications including -18.7% efficiency and 166mm/22.8% efficiency, again listing prices in RMB and USD and their fluctuations. The table highlights price variations, such as a 2.3% increase for multi-crystalline wafers and a 6.3% increase for multi-crystalline PERC cells, while some monocrystalline PERC cells show a decrease of -0.6%. The data is organized to reflect market dynamics, including currency conversions and efficiency ratings.

body.title: Solar Cell and Module Price Table
body.metadata: Solar cell pricing, module pricing, currency, price variations, component materials
body.data: The table presents pricing information for single-junction PERC solar cells and modules, categorized by different cell sizes (182mm and 210mm) and currencies (USD and RMB). For 182mm PERC cells, prices are listed as 1.175 USD, 1.150 USD, and 1.165 USD, with a 0.4% variation noted. For 210mm PERC cells, prices are 0.159 USD, 0.157 USD, and 0.157 USD, with a -2.5% variation. For 182mm PERC modules, prices are 1.170 USD, 1.120 USD, and 1.160 USD. The table also includes pricing for 182mm and 210mm single-side PERC modules in USD and RMB, with a 0.5% variation noted for both. Additionally, the table lists the price of 3.2mm and 2.0mm glass for solar modules, with values of 28.5, 27.5, and 27.5 for the 3.2mm glass, and 22.0, 21.2, and 21.2 for the 2.0mm glass, all in unspecified units. The table appears to be a comparative pricing sheet for solar cell and module components.

body.title: Price Trend of Multicrystalline Silicon and Polysilicon Feedstock
body.metadata: Price trend, multicrystalline silicon, polysilicon feedstock, RMB/KG, time series
body.data: The chart illustrates the price trends of multicrystalline silicon and polysilicon feedstock (in RMB/KG) from April 2021 to April 2022. The red line represents the price of multicrystalline silicon, which shows a sharp increase from approximately 75 RMB/KG in April 2021 to over 275 RMB/KG by September 2021, followed by a slight decline and stabilization around 250 RMB/KG. The gray line represents the price of polysilicon feedstock, which remains relatively stable throughout the period, fluctuating between approximately 175 RMB/KG and 225 RMB/KG. The chart indicates that the price of multicrystalline silicon is significantly more volatile compared to polysilicon feedstock during this time frame.

body.title: Solar Wafer Price Trend Chart
body.metadata: Solar wafer prices, multi-crystalline, mono-crystalline, time series, price fluctuations
body.data: The line chart displays the price trends of different types of solar wafers from January 2021 to April 2022. The vertical axis represents price (in unspecified units), ranging from 1 to 11, while the horizontal axis indicates time, marked by monthly intervals. Five distinct lines represent different wafer types: multi-crystalline wafers with金刚线 (diamond wire) cutting, mono-crystalline wafers with 166mm, 182mm, and 210mm sizes, and mono-crystalline wafers with 158.75mm size. The multi-crystalline wafer with金刚线 cutting (red line) shows the lowest price range, while the mono-crystalline wafers with larger sizes (orange, gray, and dark gray lines) generally exhibit higher prices. Prices for all wafer types show fluctuations over time, with some periods of decline and others of increase, particularly noticeable in late 2021 and early 2022. The 210mm mono-crystalline wafer (orange line) consistently maintains the highest price among all categories throughout the period.

body.title: 图表14:组件价格走势（元/瓦）
body.metadata: Component price trend; PERC cells; different thicknesses; time series; price fluctuation
body.data: The line chart illustrates the price trend of different thicknesses of single-crystal PERC solar cells over time, from October 2021 to April 2022. The vertical axis represents the price in RMB per watt, ranging from 0.4 to 1.3, while the horizontal axis indicates the timeline in monthly intervals. Four distinct lines represent different cell thicknesses: 158.75mm / 22.4%+ (gray), 166mm / 22.8%+ (black), 182mm / 22.8%+ (red), and 210mm / 22.8%+ (dark red). All lines show a general upward trend in price over the period, with the 158.75mm cells starting at the highest price point (~1.25 RMB/W) and gradually declining, while the 210mm cells start at the lowest price (~1.0 RMB/W) and increase steadily. The 182mm and 166mm cells show relatively stable prices, hovering around 1.1-1.2 RMB/W, with slight fluctuations. The chart indicates that as cell thickness increases, the price tends to decrease initially but stabilizes at a lower level over time.

body.title: Price Trend of 182mm and 210mm Monocrystalline PERC Modules
body.metadata: Solar module price, 182mm, 210mm, PERC, monthly trend
body.data: The line chart illustrates the price trend of 182mm and 210mm monocrystalline PERC modules from April 2021 to April 2022. The horizontal axis represents time in months, while the vertical axis indicates the price in units (likely RMB per watt or similar). The 182mm module price (black line) remains relatively stable around 1.7 to 1.8 units throughout the period. In contrast, the 210mm module price (orange line) shows a more dynamic trend: it starts at approximately 1.7 units, rises sharply to a peak of about 2.1 units in late 2021, then declines slightly before stabilizing around 1.9 units from early 2022 onwards. The 210mm module consistently commands a higher price than the 182mm module across the entire timeframe.

body.title: Comparison of Price Trends for 2mm and 3mm Photovoltaic Glass
body.metadata: Photovoltaic glass, price trend, 2mm, 3mm, time series, 2021-2023
body.data: The line chart compares the price trends of 2mm and 3mm photovoltaic glass from January 2021 to April 2023. The vertical axis represents price in yuan per square meter, and the horizontal axis represents time. The red line indicates the price of 3mm photovoltaic glass, which starts at approximately 45 yuan/m² in January 2021, experiences a sharp decline to around 25 yuan/m² by April 2021, and then stabilizes around 25-27 yuan/m² until April 2023. The gray line indicates the price of 2mm photovoltaic glass, which begins at about 32 yuan/m² in January 2021, drops to around 20 yuan/m² by April 2021, and then remains relatively stable around 20-22 yuan/m² until April 2023. Overall, the price of 3mm photovoltaic glass is consistently higher than that of 2mm photovoltaic glass throughout the period, and both prices show a general downward trend followed by stabilization.

body.title: 5风险因素
body.data:
新能源车销量不及预期；新能源汽车安全风险；受疫情影响光伏市场解封不及预期；原材料价格波动风险；海上风电审批和开工不及预期；风电已核准项目完工并网不及

 资料来源：携宁科技云估值，万联证券研究所

 同步大市：未来6个月内行业指数相对大盘涨幅10%至-10%之间;

 弱于大市：未来6个月内行业指数相对大盘跌幅10%以上。

body.title: Stock Performance Table
body.metadata: Stock codes, company names, market capitalization, net assets, closing prices, market share, net assets, investment ratings
body.data: The table presents detailed financial and market performance data for five listed companies. Each row corresponds to a company, identified by its stock code and company name. The columns include: 21A (market capitalization), 22E (net assets), 23E (closing price), 21A (market share), 22E (net assets), 23E (investment rating). For example, the company with stock code 603697.SH (瑞泰科技) has a market capitalization of 2.52, net assets of 3.27, and a closing price of 4.39, with a market share of 91.70 and an investment rating of “买入” (Buy). The data spans multiple financial metrics, offering a comprehensive view of each company’s performance and investment potential.

body.title: 公司投资评级
body.data:
买入：未来6个月内公司相对大盘涨幅15%以上；

 增持：未来6个月内公司相对大盘涨幅5%至15%;

 观望：未来6个月内公司相对大盘涨幅-5%至5%；

 卖出：未来6个月内公司相对大盘跌幅5%以上。

 基准指数：沪深300指数

body.title: 提
body.data: 研究机构采用计向的计股中：的额题债证证]考虑的因素。投资者应阅读整篇报告，以获取比较完整的观点与信息，不应仅仅依靠投资评级来推断结论。

body.data: _证券告证产券分]荐意见或观点而直接或间接收到任何形式的补偿。
